rationale: Opening on the tonic A in deep shadow — a single thin line of moonlight catching still water, breathing slowly with the phrase. Nothing else.

input.svg_markup: <svg viewBox="-500 -60 1000 120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="ml" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0" y2="0"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#f5e6c8" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#f5e6c8" stop-opacity="0.95"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#f5e6c8" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><radialGradient id="halo" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5"><stop offset="0" stop-color="#e8d4a0" stop-opacity="0.35"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#2a1f14" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient></defs><ellipse cx="0" cy="20" rx="480" ry="22" fill="url(#halo)"/><line x1="-420" y1="0" x2="420" y2="0" stroke="url(#ml)" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="-260" y1="0" x2="260" y2="0" stroke="#f5e6c8" stroke-width="1.1" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.85"/><line x1="-380" y1="14" x2="380" y2="14" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.35"/></svg>
input.semantic_label: thin line of moonlight on still water
